name: wells_criteria_dvt_scoring_workflow
description: Calculate the Wells' criteria score for Deep Vein Thrombosis (DVT) by evaluating 10 clinical criteria and summing their associated points.

inputs.input_desc: Presence of active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months). Accepted values: true or false.
Bedridden recently >3 days or major surgery within 12 weeks. Accepted values: true or false.
Calf swelling >3 cm compared to the other leg (measured 10 cm below tibial tuberosity). Accepted values: true or false.
Presence of collateral (nonvaricose) superficial veins. Accepted values: true or false.
Entire leg swollen. Accepted values: true or false.
Localized tenderness along the deep venous system. Accepted values: true or false.
Pitting edema, confined to symptomatic leg. Accepted values: true or false.
Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity. Accepted values: true or false.
Previously documented DVT. Accepted values: true or false.
Alternative diagnosis to DVT as likely or more likely. Accepted values: true or false.

steps.step_description: Evaluate each of the 10 Wells' criteria for DVT and sum the points based on the presence or absence of each criterion.

step_inputs.input_desc: Active cancer (treatment or palliation within 6 months). Accepted values: true or false.
Bedridden recently >3 days or major surgery within 12 weeks. Accepted values: true or false.
Calf swelling >3 cm compared to the other leg. Accepted values: true or false.
Collateral superficial veins (nonvaricose) present. Accepted values: true or false.
Entire leg swollen. Accepted values: true or false.
Localized tenderness along the deep venous system. Accepted values: true or false.
Pitting edema, confined to symptomatic leg. Accepted values: true or false.
Paralysis, paresis, or recent plaster immobilization of the lower extremity. Accepted values: true or false.
Previously documented DVT. Accepted values: true or false.
Alternative diagnosis to DVT as likely or more likely. Accepted values: true or false.

steps.reason: This step involves a straightforward summation of discrete point values assigned based on boolean inputs, which is a simple mathematical formula requiring no conditional branching or threshold mapping.
steps.detail: Calculate the total score by assigning points for each criterion: Criteria 1-8: +1 point if true, 0 points if false. Criterion 9: +1 point if true, 0 points if false. Criterion 10: -2 points if true, 0 points if false. Sum all assigned points.

code:
def solve(active_cancer, bedridden_or_surgery, calf_swelling, collateral_veins, entire_leg_swollen, localized_tenderness, pitting_edema, paralysis_or_immobilization, previous_dvt, alternative_diagnosis):
    # Step 1: wells_criteria_scoring - Evaluate each of the 10 Wells' criteria for DVT and sum the points based on the presence or absence of each criterion.
    total_score = 0
    # Criteria 1-8: +1 point if true, 0 points if false
    total_score += 1 if active_cancer else 0
    total_score += 1 if bedridden_or_surgery else 0
    total_score += 1 if calf_swelling else 0
    total_score += 1 if collateral_veins else 0
    total_score += 1 if entire_leg_swollen else 0
    total_score += 1 if localized_tenderness else 0
    total_score += 1 if pitting_edema else 0
    total_score += 1 if paralysis_or_immobilization else 0
    # Criterion 9: +1 point if true, 0 points if false
    total_score += 1 if previous_dvt else 0
    # Criterion 10: -2 points if true, 0 points if false
    total_score += -2 if alternative_diagnosis else 0

    yield {
        "step_name": "wells_criteria_scoring",
        "step_description": "Evaluate each of the 10 Wells' criteria for DVT and sum the points based on the presence or absence of each criterion.",
        "step_result": total_score,
        "unit": None
    }
    return total_score
